Interface ITask

All Known Implementing Classes:
AlgoAlarmIndicatorEvaluationTask, CheckInactiveSecurityAndDividendeInterestTask, CheckReloadSecurityAdjustedPricesAfterSplitTask, CopyTenantToDemoAccountsTask, CreateStockexchangeTradingDaysMinusByIndexTask, CurrencyChangedTenantAndPortfolioTask, CurrencyChangedTenantOrPortfolioTask, GTNetAdminMessageDeliveryTask, GTNetExchangeLogAggregationAndDelGTNetMessagesTask, GTNetExchangeSyncTask, GTNetFutureMessageDeliveryTask, GTNetSecurityImportTask, GTNetServerStatusCheckTask, GTNetSettingsBroadcastTask, HoldingSecurityRebuildTask, LoadEcbCurrencyExchangeRatesTask, LoadEmptyCurrencypairHistoryquotesTask, MailRoleMessagePurgeTask, MonitorHistoricalPriceDataTask, MonitorIntradayPriceDataTask, MoveCreatedByUserToOtherUserTask, PeriodicallyDividendUpdCheckTask, PriceDividendSplitCalendarUpdateTask, RebuildHoldingCashaccountDepositTask, RebuildHolingAllTenantOrSingleTask, ResetConnectorRetryCountersTask, SecurityLoadHistoricalIntraPriceDataTask, StandingOrderExecutionTask, TokensPurgeTask, TransferDividendToTransactionTest, UDFUser0FillPersitentValueTask, Upd_V_0_11_0, UpdateDividendForSecurityTask, UpdateSplitForSecurityTask
public interface ITask
Interface for background task implementations.

Defines the contract for all background tasks that can be executed by the task processing system. Implementations handle specific business logic for different types of background operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default boolean
    canBeInterrupted()
    Indicates whether this task can be safely interrupted during execution.
    void
    doWork(TaskDataChange taskDataChange)
    Executes the main task logic.
    default List<String>
    getAllowedEntities()
    Gets the list of entity types this task is allowed to process.
    ITaskType
    getTaskType()
    Gets the task type identifier.
    default long
    getTimeoutInSeconds()
    Gets the maximum execution time for this task.
    default boolean
    removeAllOtherPendingJobsOfSameTask()
    Indicates whether other pending jobs of the same task type should be removed when this task is scheduled.

  • Method Details

    • getTaskType

      ITaskType getTaskType()
      Gets the task type identifier.
      Returns:
      the task type this implementation handles

    • doWork

      void doWork(TaskDataChange taskDataChange) throws TaskBackgroundException
      Executes the main task logic.
      Parameters:
      taskDataChange - the task data containing execution parameters
      Throws:
      TaskBackgroundException - if task execution fails

    • removeAllOtherPendingJobsOfSameTask

      default boolean removeAllOtherPendingJobsOfSameTask()
      Indicates whether other pending jobs of the same task type should be removed when this task is scheduled.
      Returns:
      true if other jobs should be removed, false otherwise

    • getAllowedEntities

      default List<String> getAllowedEntities()
      Gets the list of entity types this task is allowed to process.
      Returns:
      list of allowed entity names, or null if no restrictions

    • canBeInterrupted

      default boolean canBeInterrupted()
      Indicates whether this task can be safely interrupted during execution.
      Returns:
      true if task supports interruption, false otherwise

    • getTimeoutInSeconds

      default long getTimeoutInSeconds()
      Gets the maximum execution time for this task.
      Returns:
      timeout in seconds, or 0 if no timeout is set
